pi_items.source: Web search and academic sources (Cornell LII, legal dictionary references) confirm 'Stare Decisis' is a real legal term included in Black's Law Dictionary 11th edition
Amazon, AbeBooks, LawProse, and multiple web sources confirm Black's Law Dictionary is the official name of the legal reference work
Multiple sources including Amazon, LawProse, and web search results confirm Bryan A. Garner as Editor in Chief of Black's Law Dictionary 11th edition
Web search results confirm Black's Law Dictionary 11th edition was published by Thomson Reuters on June 10, 2019 (standard edition)
Multiple sources (Amazon, AbeBooks, web search) confirm the 2019 publication is the 11th edition of Black's Law Dictionary with ISBN 9781539229759

privileged_info_summary: The task asks an agent to create a dictionary entry reference in Juris-M for the legal term 'Stare Decisis' from Black's Law Dictionary, 11th edition (2019), edited by Bryan A. Garner and published by Thomson Reuters. All metadata claims are verified against real published sources: 'Stare Decisis' is a genuine legal concept meaning 'to stand by things decided,' documented in Black's Law Dictionary; the 11th edition was published by Thomson Reuters in June 2019; Bryan A. Garner is confirmed as the Editor in Chief. The data references a real, widely-published legal reference work, not synthetic data.
